# Contributing to reposnap-mcp

Thanks for your interest in contributing!

## Editing the Wiki

Wiki content lives in the `wiki/` folder in this repo. To make changes:

1. Open a PR that modifies files under `wiki/`.
2. Once merged to `main`, a GitHub Action automatically syncs the changes to the [GitHub Wiki](https://github.com/abduznik/reposnap-mcp/wiki).

**Do not edit the GitHub Wiki directly** — any changes made there will be overwritten the next time the sync action runs.

## Reporting Issues

Open an issue on the [Issues page](https://github.com/abduznik/reposnap-mcp/issues).

## Submitting Code

1. Fork the repo and create a branch.
2. Make your changes.
3. Open a PR against `main`.
